title: polygala macrostigma
intro: Polygala macrostigma, also known as Yuan zhi, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which help in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Polygala macrostigma include its ability to alleviate insomnia, reduce stress, and improve cognitive function, making it a popular natural remedy for anxiety and fatigue. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be used in capsule or tablet form, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
